en_title: Shift Up CEO Explains Design of Stellar Blade: Blood Rain's New Main Character
cn_title: 《剑星》总监谈新主角伊薇设计：更年轻但个性更强
subtitle: 新园长上工
opus_summary: 《剑星：血雨》总监金亨泰在IGN采访中透露，新主角伊薇比前作伊芙更年轻、体型更小，但个性更强、战斗更激烈。针对伊薇童颜设计争议，他表示玩家实际游玩后会喜欢这个角色。续作故事独立，无需玩过前作即可享受。

paragraphs.en: The boss of Stellar Blade: Blood Rain developer Shift Up has discussed the design of new main character Evie, highlighting the differences between her and the protagonist of the first game, Eve.
paragraphs.cn: 《剑星：血雨》开发商Shift Up的总监讨论了新主角伊薇（Evie）的设计，强调了其与初代主角伊芙（Eve）之间的差异。

paragraphs.en: Shift Up announced Stellar Blade: Blood Rain at Summer Game Fest last week with an eye-catching trailer that revealed Evie, a brand new main character who prefers to punch her way through enemies than take the slice and dice approach favored by her predecessor.
paragraphs.cn: Shift Up上周在夏日游戏节上公布了《剑星：血雨》，一支引人注目的预告片展示了新主角伊薇。她更喜欢用拳头击倒敌人，而非前作主角擅长的刀剑切割方式。

paragraphs.en: The biggest talking point coming out of the trailer reveal was the design of Evie herself, with some expressing concern about her seemingly child-like face in the context of her more adult-sounding voice acting and body design.
paragraphs.cn: 预告片公布后最大的话题是伊薇的设计本身——一些人对其看似童颜的面孔，与更显成熟的配音和身体设计之间的反差表示担忧。

paragraphs.en: In an interview with IGN following the Summer Game Fest reveal, Shift Up CEO Hyung-tae Kim confirmed that Evie being Eve’s junior was a conscious design decision.
paragraphs.cn: 在夏日游戏节公布后接受IGN采访时，Shift Up CEO金亨泰确认，伊薇比伊芙年轻是刻意的设计决定。

paragraphs.en: “Yes. She is younger. She's smaller in size. She's shorter than Eve,” he said, “but she has a stronger personality and engages in much tougher battles. And she's actually part of a special squad that chases after a group of terrorists who cause terror attacks here and there in the city.”
paragraphs.cn: 「是的，她更年轻，体型更小，比伊芙矮，」他说，「但她的个性更强，参与的战斗也更加激烈。她实际上是一支特殊小队的成员，追捕一群在城市各处制造恐怖袭击的恐怖分子。」

paragraphs.en: Eve in Stellar Blade is a highly sexualized character, so we asked Hyung-tae Kim if he was worried that by using a young-looking character for Blood Rain, Shift Up was running the risk that some people would view Evie in a way the developer doesn’t want.
paragraphs.cn: 《剑星》中的伊芙是一个高度性感化的角色，因此我们问金亨泰，是否担心在《血雨》中使用一个看起来年轻的角色，会让一些人以开发商不希望的方式看待伊薇。

paragraphs.en: “If you actually play the game, you will not think that,” he replied. “I definitely like how Eve looked in the previous Stellar Blade. But this time, Evie, not just her physical looks, but her personality, the way she talks, the way she engages in battles, all that will combine together, and you'll see that she’s a very lovable character.”
paragraphs.cn: 「如果你实际玩到游戏，就不会这么想了，」他回答道，「我当然喜欢前作《剑星》中伊芙的外貌。但这次，伊薇不仅在外貌上，她的个性、说话方式、战斗方式，所有这些结合在一起，你会发现她是一个非常可爱的角色。」

paragraphs.en: The first Stellar Blade is known for its revealing, unlockable outfits, and from the sounds of things there are no plans to tone things down for the sequel. “It will be even more appealing,” Hyung-tae Kim said of Evie’s outfits. “That's all we can say.”
paragraphs.cn: 初代《剑星》以其可解锁的暴露服装而闻名，从目前情况来看，续作并没有打算收敛。「会更加吸引人，」金亨泰谈到伊薇的服装时说，「我们只能透露这么多。」

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere in our interview, we asked Hyung-tae Kim why Shift Up decided to go with a new protagonist instead of sticking with Eve in the first place, given her popularity with players. He replied to tease a plot point that will eventually help to explain the decision. “We cannot tell you everything right now because this would be a spoiler," Hyung-tae Kim said, "but once you have played the sequel, you will see that Eve's backstory will be more memorable. It will be more attractive in a way.”
paragraphs.cn: 在采访的其他部分，我们问金亨泰，鉴于伊芙在玩家中的人气，为什么Shift Up一开始决定采用新主角而非沿用伊芙。他透露了一个剧情点，最终将有助于解释这一决定。「我们现在不能告诉你全部，因为这会剧透，」金亨泰说，「但当你玩到续作后，你会发现伊芙的背景故事会更加令人难忘，在某种程度上也会更加吸引人。」

paragraphs.en: So, is Eve’s story over, or will fans get more Stellar Blade story involving Eve?
paragraphs.cn: 那么，伊芙的故事就此结束了吗？粉丝们还能看到更多涉及伊芙的《剑星》故事吗？

paragraphs.en: “Well, first of all, the sequel story, it stands alone so you don't have to know the previous story to properly enjoy this," replied Hyung-tae Kim. "But if you did play the first one, you will see a lot of points here and there, very memorable and impressive moments where it's like, ‘Oh, so that's what happened. That's what it turned out to be.’”
paragraphs.cn: 「嗯，首先，续作的故事是独立的，所以你不需要了解前作的故事也能好好享受，」金亨泰回答道，「但如果你玩过前作，你会看到很多地方，很多令人难忘和印象深刻的时刻，让你觉得『哦，原来是这样。原来如此。』」

paragraphs.en: Shift Up has said Blood Rain is the “next chapter” in the Stellar Blade franchise. It’s set in the same universe as Stellar Blade, and continues the story beyond the events of the first game. It’s still early in development, but, Shift Up said, the development team “has made incredible progress.”
paragraphs.cn: Shift Up表示《血雨》是《剑星》系列的「下一章」。它与《剑星》设定在同一个宇宙，故事延续初代事件之后。目前仍处于早期开发阶段，但Shift Up表示开发团队「取得了令人难以置信的进展」。

paragraphs.en: As IGN has reported, Shift Up has yet to decide on Stellar Blade: Blood Rain launch platform plans , but given it’s self-publishing the sequel, the door is open to a day one release across PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X and S.
paragraphs.cn: 据IGN报道，Shift Up尚未确定《剑星：血雨》的发售平台计划，但鉴于其自行发行该续作，因此有可能在PC、PS5以及Xbox Series X|S上同步首发。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上通过 @wyp100找到他，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系，也可通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
